<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Gif\Blocks; use Intervention\Gif\AbstractEntity; class ColorTable extends AbstractEntity { /** * Create new instance * * @param array<Color> $colors * @return void */ public function __construct(protected array $colors = []) { // } /** * Return array of current colors * * @return array<Color> */ public function getColors(): array { return array_values($this->colors); } /** * Add color to table */ public function addRgb(int $r, int $g, int $b): self { $this->addColor(new Color($r, $g, $b)); return $this; } /** * Add color to table */ public function addColor(Color $color): self { $this->colors[] = $color; return $this; } /** * Reset colors to array of color objects * * @param array<Color> $colors */ public function setColors(array $colors): self { $this->empty(); foreach ($colors as $color) { $this->addColor($color); } return $this; } /** * Count colors of current instance */ public function countColors(): int { return count($this->colors); } /** * Determine if any colors are present on the current table */ public function hasColors(): bool { return $this->countColors() >= 1; } /** * Empty color table */ public function empty(): self { $this->colors = []; return $this; } /** * Get size of color table in logical screen descriptor */ public function getLogicalSize(): int { return match ($this->countColors()) { 4 => 1, 8 => 2, 16 => 3, 32 => 4, 64 => 5, 128 => 6, 256 => 7, default => 0, }; } /** * Calculate the number of bytes contained by the current table */ public function getByteSize(): int { if (!$this->hasColors()) { return 0; } return 3 * pow(2, $this->getLogicalSize() + 1); } }
